name: netdust-core
description: Netdust business + ops + content core: per-project memory (SessionStart load + Stop-hook DECISION:/RISK:/LESSON:/TODO: tag capture), the destructive-command PreToolUse guard, content/marketing skills (brand-voice, marketing, market-research), the research skill, ops/infra skills (ploi, secure-server, dev-stack — DDEV/branch-flow/.env), the 9-method /deploy dispatcher, /memory-audit + /pattern-miner knowledge commands, and the ploi MCP. NOT a coding harness — the build harness (gates, craft skills, reviewer agents, TDD/threat-model/shake-out, /integration + /shakeout) lives in netdust-agent. Stack-agnostic. Layered on by netdust-wp, netdust-statamic.
